title: draba albertina
intro: Draba albertina, also known as Albert's draba, is a plant species that belongs to the mustard family (Brassicaceae). It is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving respiratory health, and potentially reducing the risk of certain cancers. Draba albertina is traditionally prepared as a tea or tincture, and it can also be used in herbal supplements or topical creams for its medicinal properties.
